_provenance.note: No live GitLab mirror is reachable from this environment (CP-A3b deferred to the SCIT phase). Hand-authored from the documented GitLab REST API v4 merge request response shape (https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/api/merge_requests.html#get-single-mr): iid, description, labels[], author.username — the subset gitlab.mjs#prView reads.
